untranslatable_reason: Head and shoulders pattern detection requires explicit pattern recognition logic (identification of left shoulder, head, right shoulder, and neckline) which cannot be expressed using only price, moving averages, and standard technical indicators. The entry condition 'Right shoulder penetrates the neckline' requires pattern geometry analysis not available in the allowed indicator set. Similarly, the dynamic price target calculation based on head height relative to neckline requires pattern-specific measurements.
translation_notes: This signal fundamentally requires candlestick pattern recognition beyond indicator-based rules. The entry depends on identifying a head-and-shoulders formation and detecting neckline penetration, which requires: (1) locating three distinct peaks/valleys in specific geometric relationship, (2) measuring the head height relative to neckline, and (3) confirming right shoulder penetration. The exit is equally pattern-dependent as it requires measuring the distance from head-top to neckline and projecting downward. These operations cannot be decomposed into standard indicator comparisons. A pattern recognition module would be required to implement this signal.
